caption: A man with dark hair and a beard, wearing a grey blazer over a white shirt, stands on a stage giving a presentation. He is positioned to the left of a large projection screen that displays a dark blue background with a network graphic. The screen text reads, "TODAY: INDUSTRY-READY ML", followed by a list including "Overview & caveats in scaling data pipelines", "Airflow components (Celery, ML models, etc)", "Introducing difference between ML & Data Pipelines", "Overview of Airflow + Usecase", and "THE BIG PICTURE". Below the screen, a white banner features the "europython" logo and the text "Edinburgh 23-29 July 2018". Across the sequence, the man shifts his posture; initially standing still with his arms at his sides, he later raises his left hand to gesture while speaking, moving his arm and hand slightly between the final frames.
